name: Holiday Eggnog
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat egg yolks with 1/4 cup sugar until very thick.
2. Gradually stir in milk, beer, and brandy.
3. Beat egg whites until foamy.
4. Gradually beat in 1/4 cup sugar, continuing to beat until stiff peaks form.
5. Fold the whipped whites into the yolk-beer mixture.
6. Chill the eggnog.
7. Just before serving, fold in the whipped cream.
8. Serve in small punch cups and sprinkle with nutmeg.
Makes 6 cups, or 12 half-cup servings.
